source_jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SQUADS

Squads is a financial technology company building products and APIs for the stablecoin economy. We build on open infrastructure, global money and internet capital markets to deliver better financial services to every business, individual and developer.




OUR PRODUCTS

 - Squads Multisig: The premier multisig platform for Solana.

 - Altitude: A global business account to save, earn and move money.

 - Fuse: A personal finance app for stablecoins and tokenized assets.

These three products are powered by our stablecoin infrastructure and developer platform: Grid.

Our investors include Haun Ventures, Multicoin Capital, Electric Capital, Coinbase Ventures, Toly, Mert, and others.

Squads Multisig is our self-custodial platform for securing and managing assets on Solana. It’s built for Solana treasuries, program upgrades, validator operations and token management.

Trusted by 450+ teams to secure over $10 billion in value, Squads Multisig is used by almost every team in the Solana ecosystem, including leading protocols such as Jito, Jupiter, Drift, Kamino, and Helius.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you’ll join a high-caliber team at the intersection of design and engineering. You will own the development of intuitive, performant, and secure web applications built on Squads Protocol.

You’ll work across product, design, and engineering to shape user experiences from ideation to production, with full ownership of feature development. If you're a multidisciplinary builder who obsesses over elegant interfaces and clean code—this is your playground.

This role is ideal for someone who wants autonomy, thrives in rapidly evolving environments and wants to make an outsized impact in a fast-moving Web3 environment.




WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

 - Rapidly implement functional, responsive UI components from designs, with attention to performance and accessibility

 - Lead frontend architecture and help evolve our design system

 - Collaborate with product and engineering teams to ship features from concept to launch

 - Maintain and improve the application codebase with scalable, well-documented, and tested code

 - Uphold high coding standards, contribute to code reviews, and mentor junior engineers




QUALIFICATIONS


CORE EXPERTISE:

 - Demonstrated expertise (5+ years) in building and delivering high-performance, visually refined web applications, with a deep understanding of browser fundamentals, modern JavaScript (ES6+), and advanced TypeScript features.5

 - Strong proficiency in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend development best practices with Clean, modular, async-safe code

 - You approach product engineering with a user-first mindset, proactively shaping features and interfaces to deliver intuitive, delightful, and accessible experiences.

 - Solid grasp of systems design, debugging, and application performance

 - Experience working with REST APIs and backend systems, gPRC and WebSocket APIs

 - Strong communication skills and comfort with ambiguity—able to propose and lead solutions proactively

 - Understands extension sandboxing and least-privilege permissions


CORE SKILLS

 - TypeScript, React,

 - Next.js http://next.js, Server Components,

 - Jōtai (or similar),

 - Vanilla Extract, StoryBook, Jest (or similar)

 - Web Browser API fundamentals,

 - Solana Web3.js http://web3.js,

 - Web Workers,

 - Web security fundamentals (CSP, CORS, JWT, etc),

 - Chrome Extension APIs ,


NICE TO HAVE:

 - Interest or experience in hybrid design-engineering roles

 - Portfolio of UI/UX work and familiarity with Figma

 - Knowledge of blockchain UX patterns and product flows

 - Experience with Solana development (wallet adapters, token programs, client SDKs)




WHY SQUADS

 - Build the future of open finance. You’ll help accelerate adoption of stablecoin‑powered solutions at a time when finance is shifting to programmable, borderless rails

 - Broaden your impact. Drive alignment, innovation,

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALTITUDE

Stablecoins crossed $300 billion in circulation. Real businesses now use them for cross-border settlements, contractor payments, treasury operations.

The fintech playbook assumed rails were fixed - you couldn't change ACH or SWIFT, only build better interfaces on top. Stablecoins change the rails themselves, creating an opening for a new generation of financial products.

Altitude https://squads.xyz/altitude is what we're building to capture it. Business accounts on stablecoin rails: global accounts, cross-border payments, cards, invoicing, yield. Over 500 businesses use it today. Built by Squads (Squads Multisig secures $10B+ on Solana). Backed by Haun, Multicoin, Solana, Coinbase, Electric Capital, Placeholder and others.

More on the thesis here https://x.com/SimkinStepan/status/2005026139404993003?s=20.




THE ROLE

You’re the person who opens every door. Your job is to find the right companies, reach them at the right moment, and fill the pipeline that drives Altitude’s growth.

The role of a BDR has fundamentally changed. You’ll partner directly with GTM Engineering to build an AI-powered outbound machine: identifying perfect-fit accounts, timing outreach to real signals, and running multi-channel campaigns across email, Telegram, X, LinkedIn, cold calls, DMs, and beyond. The goal is to spend most of your day on calls, qualifying real opportunities and handing them to the sales team ready to close.

We’re not repeating the old outbound playbook. We’re building a new one: signal-driven, AI-native, and designed for a product that lives on the frontier of the future of financial operations. You’ll help define what the AI-native outbound playbook looks like as the team scales.




WHAT YOU’LL OWN

Outbound Prospecting

 - Run high-volume outbound across email, Telegram, X, LinkedIn, cold calls, and DMs. Every channel is your channel

 - Build and execute AI-powered multi-touch sequences that get responses, not just impressions

 - Test messaging, channels, and cadences constantly. What worked last month might not work next month

 - Partner with the GTM Engineer to build and refine the systems that power your outreach: Apollo, Attio, and whatever else gets results

Research & Targeting

 - Identify high-fit accounts across the stablecoin and broader crypto ecosystem

 - Surface new ICPs where stablecoin-native business banking can solve real pain points

 - Use AI to identify high-intent signals across various data sources to spot the perfect moment to reach out, not just the right company

 - Know the ecosystem cold: who’s raising, who’s launching, who’s hiring, who just got funded

Qualification & Handoff

 - Keep a packed calendar of qualification calls. If you’re not on a call, you’re booking the next one

 - Qualify inbound and outbound leads against Altitude’s ICP before they hit the pipeline

 - Run initial conversations that surface real pain points around treasury, payments, and yield

 - Hand off qualified opportunities to AEs with full context: who they are, what they need, why now

Field Presence

 - Occasionally attend crypto conferences and side events to generate pipeline in person

 - Support AEs at dinners, roundtables, and 1:1s when an extra set of hands makes the trip more productive
   
   


YOU MIGHT BE RIGHT FOR THIS IF

 - You’re relentless about activity. Volume isn’t something anyone needs to coach you on

 - You’ve done this before and you know how to get strangers to respond by hitting them at the right time with the right message

 - You’re genuinely curious about stablecoins, onchain finance, and the companies building in this space

 - You know how to build a machine that can write highly personalized cold emails and DMs at scale

 - You’re AI-native: you’re already using AI to write faster, research smarter, and automate the tedious stuff

 - You’re organized despite the chaos. Your CRM is clean, your follow-ups are on time, your pipeline is real

 - You don’t need to be told

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ALTITUDE

Stablecoins crossed $300 billion in circulation. Real businesses now use them for cross-border settlements, contractor payments, treasury operations.

The fintech playbook assumed rails were fixed - you couldn't change ACH or SWIFT, only build better interfaces on top. Stablecoins change the rails themselves, creating an opening for a new generation of financial products.

Altitude https://squads.xyz/altitude is what we're building to capture it. Business accounts on stablecoin rails: global accounts, cross-border payments, cards, invoicing, yield. Over 500 businesses use it today. Built by Squads (Squads Multisig secures $10B+ on Solana). Backed by Haun, Multicoin, Solana, Coinbase, Electric Capital, Placeholder and others.

More on the thesis here https://x.com/SimkinStepan/status/2005026139404993003?s=20.




THE ROLE

You're hungry, love creating value for customers, and believe the future of business banking will be built on stablecoins. You'll own the full sales cycle, from cold outreach to funded account.

You'll be an early member of Altitude's fast-growing sales team. You'll build your own pipeline, run your own deals, and close new logos across the crypto ecosystem. This isn't a role that depends on inbound. You generate, qualify, and convert, then hand off to customer success once the account is funded. You report directly to senior leadership.

Stablecoin-native business finance is a new category. There's no established sales playbook, no dominant competitor's motion to copy. You'll build the playbook and set the standards as we scale the team. The growth potential here, both for the business and your career, is massive.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN


PIPELINE & OUTBOUND

 - Drive high-volume outbound prospecting across email, social, calls, and warm intros to stablecoin-native companies

 - Build and maintain a consistently full pipeline. No empty calendars, no dry weeks.

 - Research and identify high-fit accounts across the stablecoin and broader crypto ecosystem and run targeted outbound sequences

 - Use product-led signals to prioritize and personalize outreach

 - Maintain rigorous pipeline hygiene in your CRM: every deal tracked, every stage updated, every next step scheduled


DEAL EXECUTION

 - Run a fast, disciplined deal process: first meeting to funded account in 7-14 days

 - Lead discovery calls that uncover real pain points around treasury management, payments, and yield

 - Deliver compelling product demos tailored to each prospect's specific needs

 - Navigate conversations with founders, finance leads, and operations teams to get accounts funded quickly

 - Land a mix of account sizes, from mid-market to whales


FIELD PRESENCE & EVENTS

 - Be at every major crypto conference, side event, and industry gathering. This role lives in the field.

 - Represent Altitude with energy and charisma: you're a storyteller, not just a seller

 - Build real relationships at events that turn into pipeline and funded accounts, not badge scans

 - Host dinners, roundtables, and 1:1 meetings around events to maximize every trip

 - Meet customers and prospects where they are: Dubai, Denver, Lisbon, Singapore, wherever the ecosystem gathers




YOU MIGHT BE RIGHT FOR THIS IF

 - You've sold into crypto before and your network shows it. Wallets, multisigs, onchain treasury, stablecoin rails: no glossary needed.

 - You're a pipeline machine. Activity volume isn't something you need to be coached on.

 - You light up a room at conferences and leave with 15 real conversations, not 50 badge scans

 - You can translate complex financial infrastructure into clear business value in a 30-minute call

 - You're AI-native and using it to supercharge the impact you can have as a seller, from scaling outbound, to building pipeline, and beyond

 - You're relentless but not reckless. You move fast and make decisions without needing approval loops.

 - You've worked at an early-stage company before and thrived building the

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
FINANCIAL SERVICES ARE BEING REBUILT FROM THE RAILS UP

Stablecoins, programmable blockchains, and AI are changing how financial services get built. For a decade, fintech took legacy banking, wrapped it in better software, and won on experience. The rails underneath never moved.

Now they do.

Altitude is a new kind of financial services company. Banking becomes a module, programmable like the rest of the stack. On top of it we are building the global business account: hold USD and EUR, earn APY on idle treasury, send money anywhere via local digital payment systems, across 150+ countries, no US entity required.

Built on Squads Protocol, the treasury infrastructure securing $10B+ in assets. Backed by Haun Ventures, Multicoin Capital, Electric Capital, and Coinbase Ventures.




THE ROLE

Product engineer is the job for people who want the whole arc: the problem, the design, the code, and the thing customers actually touch.

You will work directly with founders and designers, take features from a rough idea to shipped, and own them after they ship. There is no layer of project managers translating between you and the product. The distance between "this should exist" and "this is live" is meant to be short, and you are the person who keeps it short.

This is money infrastructure, so the bar is high. The interfaces should feel obvious. The code underneath should be careful. Both matter, and we do not trade one for the other.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Build customer-facing features across the stack, from the account experience down to the money movement underneath it

 - Work shoulder to shoulder with design on flows where clarity and trust are the product, not decoration

 - Ship payments, FX, yield, and treasury features on rails that settle 24/7

 - Integrate with onchain infrastructure and a wide network of PSPs

 - Own performance, correctness, and the edge cases that matter more when real money is moving

 - Help shape what gets built, not just how it gets built, and push back when something does not feel right




WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - You have shipped customer-facing products end to end, and you can point to ones you are proud of

 - Strong fundamentals in TypeScript and React, and comfort working across the full stack

 - Product taste: you care about UX, speed, and polish, and you notice when something is off

 - High ownership. You do your best work with autonomy and a clear problem, not a ticket queue

 - Care for craft that shows up in the details, especially the ones nobody asked about

 - You move fast without getting sloppy




BONUS, NOT REQUIRED

 - Background in fintech, payments, or anything where correctness and money intersect

 - Familiarity with Solana, smart accounts, or stablecoins

 - Experience with the Tanstack ecosystem, or building and maintaining a design system




OUR STACK

 - Frontend: Typescript, SPA, Tanstack (Start, DB, Form), ElectricSQL, Zod, PandaCSS

 - Backend: Rust, Axum, Temporal, Postgres, Redis

 - Infra: AWS

 - You do not need every item on that list. You should be the kind of engineer who is glad to work this close to product, performance, and real money at real scale.




HOW WE WORK

Small team, high trust, fast execution. A few things we actually mean:

 - Craftsmanship excellence. Every contribution, whatever its size, meets a high bar

 - Bias for action. We would rather ship, learn, and correct than wait for certainty

 - Radical transparency. Respectful candor over comfortable silence

 - Kindness matters. It compounds, internally and with every customer




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful equity and real upside

 - Unlimited, flexible PTO and a flexible schedule

 - Company laptop and an allowance for whatever else you need to do your best work

 - Two company-paid off-sites per year

notes: Fintech company with a strong engineering focus, building products and APIs for the stablecoin economy.
